title: Salmonellosis (Salmonella) - Canada.ca
content:
## Salmonellosis (Salmonella)
Causes, symptoms, risks, treatment, prevention, surveillance information and guidance for health professionals.

## Services and information
Causes of salmonellosis, how it is spread and where it is found.
What to look for and what to do if you become ill.
About the risks and who is most at risk.
Diagnosis and treatment for salmonellosis.
How to prevent salmonellosis.
Salmonellosis monitoring.

### For health professionals
Detailed information for health professionals.
- Public Health Agency of Canada
